d,i in ipairs({{-586559+586560;670465+-669808};{63285+-63284,241722+-241142};{877855-877274,-880576-(-881233)}})do while i[389122-389121]<i[-165474-(-165476)]do local function d(d)return Q[d+(679157+-655065)]end do local d=type local i=table.insert local H=string.len local w=Q local end return(function(Q,H,w,k,W,J,o,b,c,S,B,X,O,p,G,f,h,Z,i,R,x,y,a)S,B,i,R,x,Z,c,G,a,b,h,O,p,X,y,f=function(Q,d)local H=G(d)local w=function(w)return i(Q,{w},d,H)end return w end,function(Q,d)local
